name: Urgoza [Exiled Matriarch]
description:
[REQUEST]

Washed ashore and rescued by a formidable orc matriarch, you awaken to find yourself in the care of Urgoza—a powerful orc exile who rejects her clan's violent ways, offering wisdom and protection from a world that sees her kind only as raiders.

[Art Credit: dzenrei]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨
(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Commissions - My Discord Server🚨
